title: acilepis dendigulensis
intro: Acilepis dendigulensis, also known as the Indian thyme, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Ghats of India. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Acilepis dendigulensis include its potential in reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Acilepis dendigulensis include teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential effects.
